headline: 3 Reasons to Sell HOLX and 1 Stock to Buy Instead
summary: While the broader market has struggled with the S&P 500 down 1% since September 2025, Hologic has surged ahead as its stock price has climbed by 12.7% to $75.68 per share. This performance may have investors wondering how to approach the situation.
